author: ABC News YouTube
text:

A Georgia man reading a book about how to attract hummingbirds clearly didn't need any advice.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
This Week with George Stephanopoulos Full Broadcast - Sunday, May 31, 2026
Democratic Sen. Cory Booker, D-N.J., joins “This Week” in an exclusive interview to discuss the week in politics. NEC Director Kevin Hassett joins “This Week” to discuss how the Iran war is impacting the economy. ABC News’ Jonathan Karl gives a look at how celebrations for the country’s 250th birthday are already becoming politicized.
 
00:00 Intro
01:50 Legal experts Sarah Isgur and Dan Abrams break down the latest setbacks in court for President Trump
10:37 Sen. Cory Booker joins “This Week” in an exclusive interview
19:11 ABC News’ Elizabeth Schulze reports on the economic pressure from the war
21:27 National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett joins “This Week” to discuss the economic situation
28:52 The Powerhouse Roundtable breaks down the political headlines of the week
39:13 ABC News’ Jonathan Karl reports on the controversy over America’s 250th birthday celebration
42:52 The Roundtable re-joins for more analysis

–––

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Protesters clash with police outside New Jersey detention facility
Family visitation hours were set to resume Sunday at an immigration detention facility in New Jersey after violent clashes between protesters and police that prompted arrests and a mandatory curfew around the facility, according to the state's governor.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Good Morning America Full Broadcast - Sunday, May 31, 2026
Search teams are planning to explore deeper inside the Laos cave beyond where the five other miners were found; The top official of the World Health Organization traveled to the Democratic Republic of Congo, the epicenter of the Ebola outbreak, saying he and his team are there to listen to what's needed; Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs took down the defending champions and are now gearing up to face the New York Knicks in the NBA finals. ABC News' Ike Ejiochi breaks down the highlights; ABC News' Steve Osunsami looks back at the events that led up to the Tulsa massacre and the calls for justice that remain loud over a century later; and more on ABC's Good Morning America.

–––

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Bus driver charged with manslaughter in crash that killed 5 in Virginia
The driver of the bus at the center of a deadly chain-reaction crash on Interstate 95 in Virginia has been charged with involuntary manslaughter, state police said over the weekend.
